title: Paladin's Oath
description:
This Mod Adds Mobs Bosses Armor Weapons And Abilities
To your Minecraft World Can You Be the Best Paladin?
body:
![name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0812e2c1f12676e3df480bc70586470c8b6f5f5.png)
 Wanna feel like a paladin? Well now's your chance to do so! This mod adds mobs weapons armor and bosses to spice up your minecraft experience into one of wonder. 

Faith is the power that allows you to do special abilties. You can use these powers by picking an oath to follow. An oath of Protection, Retribuition or healing. These oaths give you special powers by pressing the u,i or o buttons but they do use some faith. Your gonna need them against the bosses of this mod. 



# NPC's!
# ![Hermit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6187b4d1ca16f935c68d4e8041026045d26d492a.png)

This NPC (that can be found in his own tower) Is An Quest Giver That you can complete for new chests with alot of new items!

![Hemrit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f5dfbb7aab185c3f40b79ddc4846536775d30f.png)

-The Hermit’s quests come with four brand-new bosses: the Soulcaller, the Stormbringer, the Hexcaller, and the Bloodbringer.
-There are also two new raids, five minibosses, and a final boss unlocked by reaching Rank 7 of the Hermit Arcana.


# New Mechanics!
# ![Illager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a273f6660c1da95c37abc9bc6bfc7b5215a4422.png)



If you're wearing the new Silver Armor, you can trade with low-ranking Illagers! They won’t attack you unless you attack them, another Illager, or participate in a raid. This works with Pillagers, Vindicators, and two brand-new mobs:The Bomber And The Berserker.

![imbue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9efdc20cf121f6c9efe42763906de7c34940203d.png)

The new Imbuement Table can be crafted!
When you kill a boss, you'll get a rune.
Placing the rune in the slot along with lapis and a weapon from the mod gives it an Imbuement.
Depending on the rune, the Imbuement will change!
If you use the table too many times, there's a chance you'll get a Bane.
These Banes are curses that can be removed with a Silver Nexus, but at a cost.

# Miscellaneous Bosses
# ![misc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c65c16a423974219f22778cd5f8fd8a698bdab.png)

These are bosses that will be a part of other Arcanas in the future!
For now, they are standalone bosses that can be found in the wild:

The Golem of Undying spawns in the Dark Oak Forest.

The Infernal Colossus can be summoned with a Nether Reactor.

Voidjaw spawns in the End, within its own palace.

# Needs Geckolib, Kleiders Custom Renderer API, Curios, and Minos Particle Presets
